system: You are the duplicate-detection step for an enterprise sales-ops automation pipeline. Decide whether any of the candidate Salesforce Cases (already on the same customer account) is THE SAME business request as the inbound email. A request is the same when it concerns the same underlying record (same order, work order, quote, or contract) AND the same requested action. Two cases about different orders, or one about a hold-release and another about a delivery change on the same order, are NOT duplicates. Resending or rephrasing the same ask IS a duplicate. Reply strictly with the specified JSON object.

{"intent": "general_inquiry", "subject": "Lead time confirmation needed — three N9020A MXA units for Q3 production", "snippet": "Hello Keysight Trade Order team,

We are finalising our Q3 production schedule and need a firm lead time read
on three Keysight N9020A MXA Signal Analyzers (3.6 GHz preset). Our
internal stage gate closes 18 June, so we need confirmation that all three
units can be on our dock at our Pune lab by 25 July at the latest.

The attached worksheet lists the three open POs we are tracking on our
side, with the line numbers and the requested delivery dates. The PDF is
the N9020A configuration we are standardising on across the lab (the Option
B25 wideband demod is mandatory, the rest are nice-to-have).

Could you confirm two things by Friday: (1) the manufacturing lead time for
the three units, including Option B25 build, and (2) whether all three can
ship together from the Singapore hub or whether one will split across hubs.
We are happy to consolidate freight if it shortens the window.", "extracted": {"customer_name": "Rituraj Shrivastava", "requested_action": "Confirm lead time and shipping consolidation for three N9020A units"}}

Email body:
Hello Keysight Order Operations,

Our finance team confirmed this morning that the two overdue invoices
flagged against PO-LH-Q3-3014 (N9030B PXA Signal Analyzer 50 GHz with
Option B85, ship-to Pune RF Lab) have cleared on the wire we sent
yesterday. Our treasury team's wire reference is WIRE-LH-2026-06-2104,
value date 2026-06-12, total settled USD 21,485 against invoices
INV-KS-2026-05-7102 and INV-KS-2026-05-7118.

Please lift the credit hold on PO-LH-Q3-3014 today. Our Pune RF Lab is
queuing the calibration acceptance window the day after the unit lands, and
any further hold will slip the lab acceptance schedule.

Attached are the wire confirmation and the treasury payment-proof worksheet.

Regards,
Rituraj
Procurement Lead, Leeway Hertz

Hello Keysight Order Operations,

The outstanding wire transfer against PO-LH-Q2-1714 (Order in Salesforce
for the E36313B + 34461A bundle, ship-to Pune Power Lab) cleared yesterday.
Our treasury team's wire reference is WIRE-LH-2026-06-2104, value date
2026-06-12. Total settled USD 21,485 against the original invoice.

Please release the credit hold on this order today so the units can ship
per the EndDate already on the order. The Pune Power Lab is queuing a
calibration acceptance window the day after delivery, so any further hold
will slip our calibration schedule.

Attached are the wire confirmation and the payment-proof worksheet from our
treasury team.

Regards,
Rituraj Singh
Procurement Lead, Leeway Hertz

Email body:
Hello Keysight Trade Order team,

We are finalising our Q3 production schedule and need a firm lead time read
on three Keysight N9020A MXA Signal Analyzers (3.6 GHz preset). Our
internal stage gate closes 18 June, so we need confirmation that all three
units can be on our dock at our Pune lab by 25 July at the latest.

The attached worksheet lists the three open POs we are tracking on our
side, with the line numbers and the requested delivery dates. The PDF is
the N9020A configuration we are standardising on across the lab (the Option
B25 wideband demod is mandatory, the rest are nice-to-have).

Could you confirm two things by Friday: (1) the manufacturing lead time for
the three units, including Option B25 build, and (2) whether all three can
ship together from the Singapore hub or whether one will split across hubs.
We are happy to consolidate freight if it shortens the window.", "po_number": null, "wo_number": null, "created_at": "2026-05-21T12:37:34.000+0000", "match_signals": ["customer_open_recent"]}, {"idx": 3, "case_id": "500dM00003JMtd8QAD", "case_number": "00001519", "status": "Working", "stage": "review_required", "request_type": "po_intake", "sub_type": null, "category": "Trade Order", "subject": "po_intake · CCC-20260521-00382", "description": "Subject: Purchase Order LH-2026-0042 — Keysight N9020A MXA Signal Analyzer x 2

Hello Keysight SalesOps team,

Please find attached our purchase order LH-2026-0042 for two units of the N9020A MXA signal analyzer.

Key details:
  - Customer: Leeway Hertz (account code LEEWAY-HERTZ-001)

  - Unit price: USD 38,500
  - Total: USD 77,000
  - Incoterm: DDP New Delhi
  - Requested ship date: 2026-06-12
  - Payment terms: NET 30 (per current MSA)

Thanks,
Rituraj
Director, Procurement
Leeway Hertz

Hello Keysight Order Operations,

Could you please release the credit hold on order SO-LH-7733? Our finance
team confirmed today that the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711
(USD 88,420.00) was cleared by wire transfer on 2026-05-16. The bank
confirmation reference is WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.

Attached is the Excel sheet our AR team uses for hold-release submissions,
with the bank reference, transaction ID, payer details, and the open
invoice it cleared.

Key details:
  - Customer: Leeway Hertz (account code LEEWAY-HERTZ-001)
  - Order to release: SO-LH-7733
  - Invoice cleared: INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00)
  - Payment date: 2026-05-16
  - Bank reference: WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077
  - Method: SWIFT wire

Please confirm when the hold has been lifted so the order can move to ship.

Thanks,
Rituraj
Director, Procurement
Leeway Hertz
